docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-01-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 BUSINESS TRIP, COMING BACK ON 2/19/05.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, DORATRIZ AKA DORA PADILLA AKA DORA - - CERVANTES NO APPEARANCES; MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
